name_cn:
Goyard Bohème Hobo~Green
Goyard HOBO is the ultimate in relaxed style! Simple, casual, and perfect for daily commuting. The bag is lightweight and soft with an amazing capacity to hold all your essentials. It features an extended comfortable leather handle and a shoulder strap suitable for a crossbody look. Includes a detachable pouch. Simply a dream bag.
Size:32 cm x 13.5 cm x 34 cm
🔍03687655..
